evals.prompt: 帮我扫描连接的 MicroPython 设备，看看有什么板子接着
evals.expected_output: Agent runs device_probe.py script to discover USB-connected devices, reports device info or no-device error
expectations: Agent uses the device_probe.py script from the skill's scripts directory
Agent runs the script via Bash tool (python3 ...device_probe.py)
Agent interprets the JSON output and presents device info to user

evals.prompt: 我的 ESP32 上接了一个 DHT22 温湿度传感器，数据引脚接在 GPIO4，帮我读一下当前温度和湿度
evals.expected_output: Agent generates MicroPython code using dht module, pushes via mpremote, reads RESULT: tagged output
expectations: Agent reads the sensor sub-skill SKILL.md for DHT22 template
Generated code imports dht module and uses Pin(4)
Generated code uses the RESULT: tag with JSON output
Generated code wraps operation in try/except with ERROR: tag
Agent uses mpremote exec or mpremote run to push code to device

evals.prompt: 让 GPIO2 上的 LED 闪烁 5 次，每次亮 0.5 秒
evals.expected_output: Agent generates MicroPython blink code with 5 iterations, pushes via mpremote
expectations: Agent reads the actuator sub-skill SKILL.md
Agent informs user about the GPIO output operation before executing (Cautious tier)
Generated code uses Pin(2, Pin.OUT) and a loop of exactly 5 iterations
Generated code includes time.sleep for 0.5 second on-time
Generated code uses RESULT: tag to confirm completion

evals.prompt: 扫描一下 I2C 总线，看看接了什么设备。SDA 接 GPIO21，SCL 接 GPIO22
evals.expected_output: Agent generates I2C scan code with specified pins, pushes via mpremote
expectations: Agent reads the diagnostic sub-skill SKILL.md
Generated code uses I2C(0, sda=Pin(21), scl=Pin(22))
Generated code calls i2c.scan() and outputs addresses
Generated code uses RESULT: tag with JSON listing found addresses

evals.prompt: 我的 ESP32 设备连上 USB 了但是没反应，mpremote 连不上，帮我恢复一下
evals.expected_output: Agent follows safety.md recovery escalation: soft reset -> remove problematic scripts -> bootloader -> reflash
expectations: Agent reads the safety.md reference for recovery procedures
Agent tries mpremote reset as first recovery step
Agent explains the escalation levels (soft reset -> bootloader -> reflash)
Agent mentions the BOOT button procedure for ESP32 if soft methods fail
